architecture_selects_**showroom**_(drama: Selects **Showroom** (dramatic spotlight, polished reflections) or **Outdoor** (golden hour, architectural backdrop)
build_**deployment** — netlify-ready: `netlify.toml` with build command `npm run build`, publish dir `out`, CORS headers on `/data/*`
general_\"loan_amount\"_replaces_the: "Loan Amount" replaces the old "Loan (90%)" line — displays the actual financed amount after downpayment
general_**5_templates**_—_product: **5 templates** — Product Description, Sales Pitch, Social Media Post, Customer Q&A, Vehicle Comparison
general_**custom_rm_input**:_type: **Custom RM input**: type any amount, auto-deselects pills when filled
general_**directions**_button_with_pin: **Directions** button with pin icon — opens Google Maps in new tab
general_**real-time_calculation**_of_mon: **Real-time calculation** of monthly payment, total interest, total payable
general_**rebate_toggle**_(on/off_switch: **Rebate toggle** (on/off switch) — auto-disables if variant has no rebate
general_**target_audience**_—_general,: **Target audience** — General, Family, Fleet, First-Time EV Buyer
general_**vehicle_selector**_with_varian: **Vehicle selector** with variant picker (dual selectors for Comparison mode)
general_**what was wrong: ** The LoanCalculator used the amortizing/reducing balance formula, but Malaysian car loans use **flat rate**.
general_`/`_—_premium_dashboard: `/` — Premium dashboard with vehicle hierarchy, finance rules, vehicle cards, charging network, sales rules, AI agent section, changelog
general_deep_contrast,_rich_colour: Deep contrast, rich colour grading, cinematic lighting
general_generates_a_ready-to-paste_midjo: Generates a ready-to-paste Midjourney prompt with:
general_professional_automotive_photogra: Professional automotive photography, magazine cover quality
general_renders_in_a_dark: Renders in a dark `pre` block ready to paste into ChatGPT/Claude/etc.
testing_**generates_a_complete_prompt**: **Generates a complete prompt** with SSOT instruction, sales rules, finance context, charging network, company info, and template-specific task — all pulled live from JSON
